subject: [PATCH 0/2] mm: zswap: free cold writeback folios promptly

reviews.author: Kairui Song
reviews.summary: Suggested using a bool skip_lru instead of freeing the folio directly, and proposed renaming swap_cache_alloc_folio to __swap_cache_alloc_folio with updated kdoc.

2026-07-18.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the performance of zswap by freeing cold writeback folios promptly after writeback completion, reducing unnecessary reclaim scans and keeping cold memory resident for shorter periods.
